title: What Happens to Your Metabolism After 40 (And How to Actually Fight Back)
seo_title: What Happens to Your Metabolism After 40?
meta_description: Muscle loss, estrogen decline, and falling NAD+ levels slow metabolism after 40. Learn what is actually happening in your body and the science-backed ways to fight back.
excerpt: Your metabolism is not broken — it is responding to real biological changes. Muscle loss, hormonal shifts, and NAD+ decline all converge after 40. Here is what the science says about addressing each one.
